intended_use: GyriCalc is intended for automatic labeling, visualization, and quantification including volume, surface area and gyrification analysis (i.e., gyrification index) of segmentable brain structures from
intended_use_full: GyriCalc is intended for automatic labeling, visualization, and quantification including volume, surface area and gyrification analysis (i.e., gyrification index) of segmentable brain structures from a set of MR images. GyriCalc is intended to be used by qualified personnel and interpreted by a qualified clinician. GyriCalc is not intended to be used for visualization or quantification of neurologic lesions. GyriCalc is intended for children between 24 to 36 months of age.
target_condition: assessment of structural brain anatomy in children; not intended for lesion detection
other_metrics: Dice coefficient: 0.92-0.99 (average 0.95); Volume measurements: mean percentage absolute difference 0.45-12.1%; Surface area measurements: mean absolute error 0.33-12.6%; Gyrification measurements: mean absolute error 0.04-0.89%
